creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yuriy,

thank you for your submission. You sent your update to graphics/ipe as a
shar file, while updates for ports are generally expected to be submitted
in (unified) diff format as produced by 'diff -u', as that makes it easier
to see what has changed. Could you resend your update as a unified diff?

Thanks and best regards,
Stefan
